query:
CREATE TRIGGER prevent_update_position_questions
BEFORE UPDATE ON position_questions
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
  SIGNAL SQLSTATE '45000'
  SET MESSAGE_TEXT = 'position_questions tablosu kilitlidir. Sorular değiştirilemez.';
END;
